diff --git a/app/api/routes/pipeline.py b/app/api/routes/pipeline.py
index a1b2c3d..e5f6g7h 100644
--- a/app/api/routes/pipeline.py
+++ b/app/api/routes/pipeline.py
@@ -23,10 +23,14 @@
 
 @router.post("/run", status_code=202)
 async def start_run(
     body: PipelineRunRequest,
     background_tasks: BackgroundTasks,
 ) -> dict:
     """
     Start a new pipeline run in the background.
     """
+    # Input Validation Guard
+    if not body.diff_text or len(body.diff_text.strip()) < 10:
+        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="diff_text must be at least 10 characters long.")
+        
     orchestrator = PipelineOrchestrator()
     # A temporary orchestration is needed to get the run_id before starting

scenarios.title: Successfully trigger a new pipeline run via API
scenarios.description: Verify that a POST request to the pipeline run endpoint initiates a background task and returns a 202 status code with a run ID.

steps.assertion: The response must contain a valid run_id string

scenarios.expected_result: A 202 Accepted status code and a JSON body containing a unique run_id.

scenarios.title: Monitor pipeline progress via SSE stream
scenarios.description: Ensure the client can connect to the SSE endpoint and receive progress events for a valid run_id.
preconditions: A pipeline run has been successfully started

steps.assertion: Event data contains pipeline stage details

scenarios.expected_result: The server streams PipelineEvents correctly until completion or disconnect.

scenarios.title: Attempt to get status for non-existent run_id
scenarios.description: Verify that the SSE status endpoint returns a 404 error when an invalid or completed run_id is provided.

steps.value: Run 'invalid-id-999' not found or already completed.

scenarios.expected_result: API returns 404 Not Found with a descriptive error message.

scenarios.title: Trigger pipeline run with malformed request body
scenarios.description: Ensure the API rejects requests that do not conform to the PipelineRunRequest schema.
scenarios.expected_result: API returns 422 Unprocessable Entity due to schema validation failure.

scenarios.title: Delete a completed pipeline report
scenarios.description: Verify that a specific report can be deleted using its run_id.
preconditions: A report exists in the reports directory
scenarios.expected_result: The report is successfully removed from the file system and is no longer accessible via API.

scenarios.title: Concurrent pipeline execution handling
scenarios.description: Trigger multiple pipeline runs simultaneously to ensure unique run_id generation and independent SSE buses.
scenarios.expected_result: Both pipelines run concurrently without resource conflict or ID collision.

scenarios.title: Directory traversal protection on report retrieval
scenarios.description: Test for path traversal vulnerability by attempting to access files outside the reports directory using the run_id parameter.
scenarios.expected_result: The application should sanitize the run_id or rely on the OS/FastAPI to prevent traversal, returning a 404 for invalid IDs.

scenarios.title: Retrieve report details with valid run_id
scenarios.description: Verify the full details of a completed run can be retrieved from the reports endpoint.
preconditions: A run has finished and its JSON report is saved
scenarios.expected_result: A full JSON representation of the PipelineRun object is returned.

import os
import pytest
from playwright.sync_api import Page, expect

# Configuration
BASE_URL = os.environ.get("BASE_URL", "http://localhost:8000")

# SCENARIO_ID: 1c16faf1-ae73-429e-89f8-d24ab3dbaa91
def test_successfully_trigger_new_pipeline_run_via_api(page: Page):
    # TODO: resolve PipelineRunRequest
    pytest.skip("payload model PipelineRunRequest not in context")

# SCENARIO_ID: 8af3882c-6071-4e8e-9cf5-4279c8be9c3f
def test_monitor_pipeline_progress_via_sse_stream(page: Page):
    # Dependency on run_id from Scenario 1c16faf1
    pytest.skip("Payload model PipelineRunRequest not in context, cannot generate valid run_id")

# SCENARIO_ID: 98a10d9b-5e28-4855-b5ce-2acda365089c
def test_status_endpoint_returns_404_for_invalid_run_id(page: Page):
    invalid_run_id = "invalid-id-999"
    status_url = f"{BASE_URL}/api/pipeline/status/{invalid_run_id}"
    
    # Navigate to endpoint to inspect rendered JSON response
    response = page.goto(status_url)
    
    # Assertions
    assert response.status == 404
    # Verify error message detail rendered in browser
    error_msg = page.get_by_text(f"Run '{invalid_run_id}' not found", exact=False)
    expect(error_msg).to_be_visible()

# SCENARIO_ID: db74c615-cf64-4bd0-82aa-6cb648e6bb5a
def test_trigger_pipeline_run_with_malformed_request_body(page: Page):
    # TODO: resolve PipelineRunRequest
    pytest.skip("payload model PipelineRunRequest not in context")

# SCENARIO_ID: 49cad32d-1f07-4197-8732-69e972d9c00d
def test_delete_completed_pipeline_report(page: Page):
    target_run_id = "test-run-to-delete"
    report_url = f"{BASE_URL}/api/reports/{target_run_id}"
    
    # Step 1: Request deletion
    delete_response = page.request.delete(report_url)
    # We verify the outcome matches the expected 204 status
    assert delete_response.status == 204
    
    # Step 2: Verify the resource is no longer accessible
    verify_response = page.request.get(report_url)
    expect(verify_response).not_to_be_ok()
    assert verify_response.status == 404

# SCENARIO_ID: 8b3b8f0c-3b6e-4f9f-8aff-462dfde965aa
def test_concurrent_pipeline_execution_handling(page: Page):
    # TODO: resolve PipelineRunRequest
    pytest.skip("payload model PipelineRunRequest not in context")

# SCENARIO_ID: 7558369e-8c71-459a-a8d3-5cabfac093d7
def test_report_endpoint_prevents_directory_traversal(page: Page):
    traversal_path = "../../etc/passwd"
    security_url = f"{BASE_URL}/api/reports/{traversal_path}"
    
    # Navigate to the malicious URL
    response = page.goto(security_url)
    
    # Assertions for security boundary
    assert response.status == 404
    # Ensure sensitive info is not leaked and error is generic or localized
    expect(page.get_by_text("Not Found", exact=False)).to_be_visible()

# SCENARIO_ID: b66f18ed-ea40-44ad-aa63-abf02164e5df
def test_retrieve_report_details_with_valid_run_id(page: Page):
    valid_run_id = "existing-run-id"
    report_url = f"{BASE_URL}/api/reports/{valid_run_id}"
    
    # Step 1: Navigate to report detail
    page.goto(report_url)
    
    # Step 2: Verify JSON content is rendered in viewport
    # We expect the unique run_id to be part of the JSON body text
    run_id_locator = page.get_by_text(valid_run_id)
    expect(run_id_locator).to_be_visible()
    
    # Verify another common field from PipelineRun schema (implied by snippet 3)
    expect(page.get_by_text("stage", exact=False)).to_be_visible()
